{"step_by_step_thinking": "The documents mention that latent TB should be ruled out in individuals with severe immunocompromise, such as those receiving treatment with tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF) inhibitors, dialysis patients with end-stage renal disease, and those with silicosis.
